title: Jkelly
compiled_truth: Jkelly is an external contact at [Fairisaac](companies/fairisaac). Over the corpus period (1999-11-02 to 2001-02-01), Jkelly sent 27 and received 88 emails, totalling 115 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dasovich](people/dasovich-haas) (19), [Kupiecki](people/kupiecki-haas) (11), [Mendelso](people/mendelso-haas) (9), [Dshah](people/dshah-haas) (8), [Davis](people/davis-haas) (8).
